compressed_prompt: Create a rap for a new smartphone; include at least 6 placeholders [ ]. P.P.S. Add a postscript starting with "P.P.S.
response:
Yo, listen up, gather 'round, I got a tale to spin,
'Bout a new smartphone droppin', it's the king, the [Brand Name] [Model].
In the tech game, we flexin', with a [Processor] under the hood,
Lightnin' fast, no contest, leavin' the rest in the [Mood].

With a [Display Size] inch screen, crystal clear, no strain,
Watchin' movies, playin' games, in the [Resolution] lane.
Camera so fire, [Megapixels] shots, you gonna love,
Snappin' moments, savin' memories, feelin' like a [Dove].

Battery life on point, [mAh], all day, no pause,
Chargin' up in a flash, thanks to that [Charging Tech], no flaws.
Storage space aplenty, [Storage Capacity] to hold,
Your apps, your pics, your world, in this device, unfold.

So, step up to the plate, don't you dare hesitate,
The [Brand Name] [Model]'s here, seal your fate.
In the smartphone saga, we writin' new pages,
With this tech titan, we enterin' new ages.

P.P.S. Keep your eyes peeled for the official release date, 'cause this smartphone's about to change the game!
